You are participating in an Agentic Mermaid subagent-backed release-model transcript eval. Return ONLY executable synchronous JavaScript body for Agentic Mermaid Code Mode; no markdown, no code fences, no prose.

Runtime contract:
- The code is passed to execute(code), so top-level `return` is allowed.
- Global `mermaid.*` SDK is available.
- Do not use async/await, Promise jobs, dynamic import, filesystem, network, or template-literal interpolation.
- For existing structured diagrams: parseMermaid -> family narrower -> mutate -> verifyMermaid -> inspect verify.ok or verify.warnings/layout -> serializeMermaid.
- SDK-returned diagrams are read-only; structured edits must use mermaid.mutate.
